A Daniele D'Agnelli Production

Daniele D'Agnelli

Senior Engagement Manager — AI & Cybersecurity

London, UK 15+ Years in Production

Director's Statement

“

Senior Engagement Manager with 15 years in Professional Services, leading high-impact digital transformations that drive revenue growth and cost efficiency. Experienced in delivering AI solutions for complex challenges across Manufacturing, Healthcare, Oil & Gas, Telecom, and Financial Services sectors for global enterprises. Skilled in aligning cross-functional teams and collaborating with senior leadership on programs exceeding $15M, consistently exceeding metrics in adoption, customer satisfaction (NPS), and operational efficiency. Known for building trust-based client relationships and adept at navigating ambiguity. Technically proficient with expertise in software engineering, solution architecture, cloud engineering, and advanced machine learning, including LLMs and Generative AI.

”

Filmography

A C3 AI Production

Senior Engagement Manager (Forward Deployed Engineering)

Starring Daniele D'Agnelli
London, United Kingdom August 2021 – Present
Synopsis

Director-level programme lead across all Business Units and Partners, managing $15M budget with 70+ resources, reporting to VP of Customer Services.

  • CEO-sponsored PdM rollout: 100+ plants, 2,000+ end users, $18M EBIT impact
  • GenAI RAG rollout across enterprise knowledge base
  • Led 20+ cross-functional team across App Dev, Data Science, QA, DevOps
  • Sustained NPS >70 across all engagements
  • Partner enablement and practice-building across consulting firms
A Deloitte Production

Manager

Starring Daniele D'Agnelli
London, United Kingdom October 2018 – July 2021
Synopsis

Grew Deloitte UK's Anaplan practice from inception to 25+ practitioners, leading enterprise deployments across telco, banking, and investment management.

  • First enterprise-wide deployment for a large British telco (7 BUs)
  • Data architecture transformation for 75K-employee American bank
  • Financial planning for £170.3B AUM UK investment firm
A Accenture Production

Management Consultant

Starring Daniele D'Agnelli
London, United Kingdom April 2017 – September 2018
Synopsis

Design Lead for Aerospace & Defence demand forecasting solution.

A Codec Production

Senior Consultant

Starring Daniele D'Agnelli
Dublin, Ireland January 2015 – March 2017
A Accenture Production

Software Engineer

Starring Daniele D'Agnelli
Milan, Italy April 2012 – December 2014
